rulings.Case Title: DEAN C. LAMB VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 23, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. P sufficiently alleges facts to support all elements of each cause of action, including intent, damages, outrageous conduct and duty under Biakanja factors. Demurrer to the Seventh cause of action for unfair business practices is not supported by legal argument in points and authorities. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al VS. CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Motion To Relate And Transfer Case For Coordination
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 23, 2013, line 4. Plaintiffs' Motion To Relate And Transfer Case For Coordination DENIED. Moving party failed to show that common issues of law and fact predominate. Additionally, per SFLR 8.10 all motion in actions CGC-13-530058 and CUD-13-645545 are heard in Department 501. Plaintiffs' untimely reply filed 7 days after original hearing date is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA D. KENNEY VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 23, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with Court's August 22, 2013 order and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. This matter has been stayed until October 15, 2013 per agreement of the parties. = (501/REQ)
